reason: Nightmare Before Christmas is a whimsical stop-motion tale set on Halloween Town.
Nightmare on Elm Street blends horror and imagination around a dream-stalking villain.
Nightwatch offers a tension-filled thriller set in the eerie hours of a hospital morgue.
Night Flier thrills with a journalist’s chase after a vampire-like killer by night.
Night Falls on Manhattan is a gritty crime drama unfolding under the city’s nighttime skies.
Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil unspools a Southern gothic mystery under moonlight.
King of New York captures the city’s underworld as it comes alive at night.
Escape from New York pits a renegade hero against the perils of a nighttime dystopia.
Blade Runner explores a neon-lit future where the night holds both wonder and danger.
Parallel Worlds of Fantasy unites tales that unfold in the uncanny stillness of night.
